steps.title: Track the singular subject
steps.content: In the phrase a writing technique that blank emphasis, the word that refers to the singular noun phrase a writing technique. The verb in the blank must agree with that singular subject.

steps.title: Choose the agreeing verb
steps.content: A is a base plural form, B is a plural progressive form, and C is a plural present-perfect form. A singular present-tense subject needs the verb form with an s ending. The answer is D.
